zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard BOZON於1280年出生在英國英格蘭戴文可洛福利時，他的父親John BOZON45歲，母親Jane Spynke26歲。他於大約1304年與Margaret Chappis在英國戴文可洛福利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1337年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard BOZON于1280年出生在英国英格兰戴文可洛福利时，他的父亲John BOZON45岁，母亲Jane Spynke26岁。他于大约1304年与Margaret Chappis在英国戴文可洛福利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1337年之后。

nameMeanings.name: BOZON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hungarian: probably from a derivative of a personal name like Boda or Bodó, Hungarian pet forms of some Slavic name such as Budimir, Budislav (see Buda 3).

Polish (Bodoń); Slovak (rarely Bodoň): derivative of the Polish verb bość (1 sg. bodę), Slovak bodať ‘to gore, to prick’, or from the German personal name Bodo . In Poland, the bearers of this surname live almost exclusively in Czarnków-Trzcianka County in Greater Poland Voivodeship.
Spanish (Bodón): topographic name from bodón ‘winter pond or pool’, or a habitational name from El Bodón (Salamanca), a place called with this word.

variants.name: Buda
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Rocco, Caesar, Enrico, Lorenzo, Sal.

Italian: from a Late Latin name buda for a kind of rush, probably used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker of articles made of such rushes. In Sicily, it could be from bbuda ‘stem of a spike’.
Italian: habitational name from either of two places called Buda.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard BOZON was born in 1280, in Clovelly, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John BOZON, was 45 and his mother, Jane Spynke, was 26. He married Margaret Chappis about 1304, in Clovelly, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1337.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard BOZON est né en 1280, à Clovelly, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John BOZON, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Jane Spynke, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Chappis environ 1304, à Clovelly, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1337.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard BOZON 1280 in Clovelly, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John BOZON 45 und seine Mutter Jane Spynke 26. Er hat um 1304 in Clovelly, Devon, England Margaret Chappis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1337.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard BOZON è nato il nel 1280 nel Clovelly, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John BOZON, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Jane Spynke, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Chappis circa 1304, nel Clovelly, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1337.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard BOZONが1280年にイギリスイギリスデボンクロベリーで生まれた時，父John BOZONは45歳，母Jane Spynkeは26歳であった。約1304年にイギリスデボンクロベリーでMargaret Chappisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1337年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard BOZON(이)가 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 클로브리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John BOZON(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Spynke(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1304년 영국 데폰 클로브리에서 Margaret Chappis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1337년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard BOZON nasceu em 1280, em Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John BOZON, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Jane Spynke, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Chappis aproximadamente 1304, em Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1337.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard BOZON родился в 1280 г. в местности клавелли, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John BOZON было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Spynke, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Chappis около 1304 г. в местности клавелли, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1337 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard BOZON nació en 1280, en Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John BOZON, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Jane Spynke, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Chappis aproximadamente 1304, en Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1337.
